body: WARRANT#90 shipped -> SLS(92)/10.06, the LATEST build. All 5 gated live-decision flags now TRUE: EnableSignAgnosticEntries, UseSoftMembershipFitting, EnableOptimalStoppingExit, EnableDissipationExit, EnableBracketFallbackOnRecheck. Diff-verified: only those 5 default values (plus comments/version banner) changed -- nothing else touched. Compiled 0 errors, deployed to the terminal's real Experts folder, ledger at pass_72, source/ex4/ledger attached here. Important, please read before your next attach: none of these 5 mechanisms has ever been live-validated -- this build is the first time any of them can actually fire. With all 5 active at once, if something looks unusual on the next run, it won't be possible to tell which of the 5 caused it just from the outcome -- you'd want to check the log lines each one produces (bracket-fallback, dissipation exit, optimal-stopping exit, sign-agnostic bracket placement, soft-membership fit results) to attribute it. Still a demo account, no real money at risk. This is ready to attach whenever you want to test it.
